title: Photo Gallery
subtitle: Reefs, courses, and divers from our daily life on Gili Meno. All photos taken by our team and students — no stock images.

images.alt: Green sea turtle gliding over coral at Turtle City, Gili Meno
images.caption: Turtle City — our most-dived site

images.alt: Vertical coral wall with sun rays piercing the water at Meno Wall
images.caption: Meno Wall — vertical drop from 5 m to 30 m+

images.alt: Bounty Wreck pontoon resting on white sand in 18 m of water
images.caption: Bounty Wreck — sunk pontoon, batfish, lionfish

images.alt: White-tip reef shark cruising over a sandy bottom at Shark Point
images.caption: Shark Point — white-tips, jacks, bamboo sharks

images.alt: Bio Rock conservation structure with new coral growth
images.caption: Bio Rock — coral regrowth on steel frames

images.alt: Coral slope at Meno Slope dive site with reef fish
images.caption: Meno Slope — gentle slope, perfect for fun-dives

images.alt: Deep coral garden at Deep Turbo with schooling fish
images.caption: Deep Turbo — deeper site for Advanced divers

images.alt: Open Water Diver student practising buoyancy with instructor in shallow tropical water
images.caption: Open Water Diver — your first ocean dives

images.alt: Advanced Adventurer diver swimming alongside a coral wall
images.caption: Advanced Adventurer — five disciplines in two days

images.alt: Eco-Scuba diver collecting marine debris on a reef cleanup dive
images.caption: Eco-Scuba — conservation diving with Trash Hero

images.alt: Family in dive gear smiling on a dive boat off Gili Meno
images.caption: Family Diving Package — kids welcome from age 10
